message:
feat(tests): add sync conformance tests for base snapshot, conflict markers, prefix handling (beads_rust-0zg2)

Add 9 new conformance tests validating bd↔br parity:

- 3 base snapshot tests (creation, content, state preservation)
- 3 conflict marker tests (full markers, partial, middle-of-file)
- 3 prefix handling tests (mismatch behavior, same prefix, status info)

All tests pass and verify consistent behavior between br (Rust) and bd (Go).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
